revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R from British English]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R from British English]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Clarified a phrase.
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from British English
  |name=From British English
  |from=a term in [[British English]] spelling
  |to=an alternative spelling variation
  |info=The spelling is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template populates a subcategory of {{cat|Redirects from alternative spellings}}, so {{tl|R from alternative spelling}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from British spelling
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from British English
  |name=From British English
  |from=a term in [[British English]] spelling
  |to=an alternative spelling variation
  |info=The spelling is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template populates a subcategory of {{cat|Redirects from alternative spellings}}, so {{tl|R from alternative spelling}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from British spelling
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from British English
  |name=From British English
  |from=a term in [[British English]] spelling
  |to=an alternative spelling variation
  |info=The spelling is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template populates a subcategory of {{cat|Redirects from alternative spellings}}, so {{tl|R from alternative spelling}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from British spelling
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from British English |name=From British English |from=a term in [[British English]] spelling |to=an alternative spelling variation |info=The spelling is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}. ** This template populates a subcategory of {{cat|Redirects from alternative spellings}}, so {{tl|R from alternative spelling}} should not be used with this template. |all category=Redirects from British spelling |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
[[Category:qq]][[sn:R from British English]][[ja:R from British English]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
